Wyoming Minimum Wage 2026
What Wyoming pays as a minimum, the rules for tipped workers, and how to recover underpaid wages.
Current minimum wage
$7.25/hr (federal minimum)
Wyoming relies on the federal minimum wage; no higher state rate is currently on the books.
State minimum is $5.15/hr, but federal minimum of $7.25 applies to most employers
Federal vs state
Federal rate applies ($7.25/hr)
Last verified
2025
How to use the Wyoming rate
Wyoming should be read as a West wage page, not just a sin...
